meta.intent: Test dock residue, blocker sequencing, and rescue order together without adding a new rule.
meta.expectedPath: Open the shared lower choke, rescue the urgent puppy, cash a planned dock triple during the pivot, then finish the safer upper puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player generically clears across the board, creates singleton-heavy dock pressure, and overflows before the rescue route is complete.
meta.whatItProves: The dock-discipline band can support an exam that still reads as rescue-first play.
meta.notes: Role: exam. Full visual occupancy is intentional for the dock-discipline exam: broad legal clears are available, but residue-heavy choices are the fail pressure. Vines are light authored route pressure with a long threshold, not the main problem.
